bookSourceComment: 笔趣阁小说站，搜索返回JSON格式，正文通过API获取。正文页有验证机制，首次访问需要等待验证完成。验证后会自动切换到新域名。使用发现功能可以浏览各分类书籍。

ruleContent.content:
var chapterUrl = result; var match = chapterUrl.match(/book\/(\d+)\/(\d+)/); if(!match){ java.toast('章节URL格式错误'); result; } var bookId = match[1]; var chapterId = match[2]; var apiDomain = source.getVariable(); if(!apiDomain){ apiDomain = 'www.bqgui.cc'; } var apiUrl = 'https://' + apiDomain + '/api/chapter?id=' + bookId + '&chapterid=' + chapterId; var jsonStr = java.ajax(apiUrl); if(jsonStr && jsonStr.includes('txt')){ try{ var data = JSON.parse(jsonStr); if(data && data.txt){ var txt = data.txt.replace(/\n/g, '
'); txt = txt.replace(/请收藏本站.*|手机版.*|bqg\d+\.com/gi, ''); txt; }else{ java.toast('获取正文失败'); result; } }catch(e){ java.toast('解析失败: ' + e); result; } }else{ var verifyUrl = 'https://' + apiDomain + '/book/' + bookId + '/' + chapterId + '.html'; var html = java.webView(verifyUrl, verifyUrl, 'setTimeout(function(){window.legado.getHTML(document.documentElement.outerHTML);},5000);'); if(html.includes('加载中') || html.includes('userverify')){ html = java.webView(verifyUrl, verifyUrl, 'setTimeout(function(){window.legado.getHTML(document.documentElement.outerHTML);},8000);'); } var domainMatch = html.match(/https?:\/\/([\w\-\.]+)\//); if(domainMatch){ var newDomain = domainMatch[1]; if(newDomain !== apiDomain){ source.setVariable(newDomain); apiDomain = newDomain; } } apiUrl = 'https://' + apiDomain + '/api/chapter?id=' + bookId + '&chapterid=' + chapterId; jsonStr = java.ajax(apiUrl); try{ var data = JSON.parse(jsonStr); if(data && data.txt){ var txt = data.txt.replace(/\n/g, '
'); txt = txt.replace(/请收藏本站.*|手机版.*|bqg\d+\.com/gi, ''); txt; }else{ java.toast('获取正文失败，请重试'); result; } }catch(e){ java.toast('解析失败: ' + e); result; } }
